Compliance.description: No regulatory complaints, fines, or issues found. Operates legally as Smollan-acquired company partnering with major brands like MTN, Unilever.

Customer Satisfaction.description: No HelloPeter/Google consumer reviews found. Employee satisfaction mixed at 3.1/5 on Indeed. Positive media coverage on growth/impact.

Product Value.description: Optimized supply chain reduces costs for township retailers vs traditional wholesalers; bulk discounts passed on.

Innovation.description: Tech platform with AI trends, real-time dashboards, geospatial mapping, WhatsApp B2B ordering tailored for townships. Field + digital hybrid model.

Customer Support.description: Field agents (220), WhatsApp ordering/support, email. No specific response quality data; assumed adequate for B2B.

Accessibility & Security.description: B2B platform with data encryption in app; no POPIA issues found; township accessibility via WhatsApp/web. Assumed standard security as Smollan subsidiary.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: B2B wholesale; competitive bulk pricing (no public consumer rates)

socialSentiment.summary: No HelloPeter/Google reviews found. Positive media on expansion/impact; no recent complaints on social/news.
